/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/rlc_handle_status_report.dir/rlc_handle_status_report.cpp.o -o rlc_handle_status_report  ../../../lib/rlc/libocudu_rlc.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../test_doubles/pdcp/libpdcp_test_doubles.a ../../../lib/instrumentation/libocudu_instrumentation.a ../../../lib/pcap/libocudu_pcap.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
